feedback_rule_candidates: Match argument count, type, unit, and enum values exactly from service_list_snippet. | Use only enum strings that appear in service_list_snippet for the selected service. | Remove unrelated helper actions and duplicate service calls. | Preserve GT-style temporal structure, receiver tags, service ordering, and literals. | Preserve all receiver tags and all(...) group receivers when the command addresses groups. | Include every service family implied by the command, including both sensor reads and actuator effects. | Prefer the smallest action sequence that directly matches the natural command verb and target. | Resolve every member token from service_list_snippet.service/canonical_name before emitting code.
